title: Can't Stop the Feeling!
why_this_song: Can't Stop the Feeling! by Justin Timberlake (2016) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 42 times; first heard in: "Nothin' I can see but you when you dance, dance, dance"
Appears 24 times; first heard in: "I got this feelin' inside my bones"
Appears 21 times; first heard in: "I can't take my eyes up off it, movin' so phenomenally"
Appears 21 times; first heard in: "Room on lock, the way we rock it, so don't stop"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I got that sunshine in my pocket, got that good soul in my feet"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: So just dance, dance, dance, come on
And under the lights when everything goes
Nowhere to hide when I'm gettin' you close
When we move, well, you already know
So just imagine (just imagine, just imagine)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feelin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feelin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I got this feelin' inside my bones

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: All through my city, all through my home
When we move, well, you already know

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Can't Stop the Feeling!" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Can't Stop the Feeling!"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Justin Timberlake one question about "Can't Stop the Feeling!", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Justin Timberlake sobre "Can't Stop the Feeling!", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Can't Stop the Feeling!" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Can't Stop the Feeling!" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
